name: A Crazy World [RPG]
description:
Society has changed much, on a completely ordinary day several months ago, the world itself changed. Magic came back, many animals evolved seemingly instantaneously, cryptids stopped hiding, and robots are now commonplace. A decent number of Nonhumans aren't used to living in society, having no knowledge of modern technology as they try to integrate into society.

This is meant to be like either of my Apocalypse RPG Bots, but now it's just nonhumans show up. There is no collapse of human society (but you can change that).

Firstly:
The picture isn't mine. I just took it from google, it's the first image I found.

Secondly:
HOLY FUCKING SHIT! Thank you all so much. This is the best 200 follower special that I could think to give yall. I probably won't be releasing too many more bots for a while, but I may be making some more Plushie Bots, and probably more Scraper City bots.

Copied from the Apocalypse RPG bots:
Yall, PLEASE leave your opinions / suggestions for any bots you have in the Reviews. Also, Have an Amazing Day/Night.

Tags / Stuff I want you to find this by in searching:
Monsters, Monster, Cryptid, Cryptids, There are Furries / Anthro Animals, Anthros, Furry, Robot, Robots, Start How You Want
creator: NerdyFutaLover
